items.title: S01E01 - The Sick Boy and the Sitter
items.summary: Alan Brady is throwing a party at his penthouse for a few of the network executives and he wants the writing staff to attend. Unfortunately for Rob though Laura thinks Richie is on the verge of being sick and wants to stay home. Rob is certain he'll be okay and wants to get a babysitter but he's having a hard time convincing Laura.

infolabels.title: The Sick Boy and the Sitter
infolabels.plot: Alan Brady is throwing a party at his penthouse for a few of the network executives and he wants the writing staff to attend. Unfortunately for Rob though Laura thinks Richie is on the verge of being sick and wants to stay home. Rob is certain he'll be okay and wants to get a babysitter but he's having a hard time convincing Laura.

items.title: S01E02 - My Blonde-Haired Brunette
items.summary: Rob has only one day off from work and Laura is upset that Rob won't eat with her or do anything but sleep until 11am. Laura tells him he got about 7 seconds worth of sleep! (She set the clock ahead two hours!) Laura worries she is getting old (because of gray hair Rob found). In the office Rob tells Buddy and Sally the problem, but Rob has no idea what he and Laura fought over (She was crying to hard)

infolabels.title: My Blonde-Haired Brunette
infolabels.plot: Rob has only one day off from work and Laura is upset that Rob won't eat with her or do anything but sleep until 11am. Laura tells him he got about 7 seconds worth of sleep! (She set the clock ahead two hours!) Laura worries she is getting old (because of gray hair Rob found). In the office Rob tells Buddy and Sally the problem, but Rob has no idea what he and Laura fought over (She was crying to hard)

items.title: S01E03 - Sally and the Lab Technician
items.summary: Laura tries to get Thomas (her cousin) and Sally together, but when Sally arrives Thomas doesn't get to say much, Thomas likes Sally anyway!

infolabels.title: Sally and the Lab Technician
infolabels.plot: Laura tries to get Thomas (her cousin) and Sally together, but when Sally arrives Thomas doesn't get to say much, Thomas likes Sally anyway!

items.title: S01E04 - Washington vs. the Bunny
items.summary: We don't have an overview translated in English. Help us expand our database by adding one.

infolabels.title: Washington vs. the Bunny
infolabels.plot: We don't have an overview translated in English. Help us expand our database by adding one.

items.title: S01E05 - Oh, How We Met on the Night That We Danced
items.summary: While clearing out the bedroom closet, Rob finds his old army boots, bringing back memories of how he and Laura first met.

infolabels.title: Oh, How We Met on the Night That We Danced
infolabels.plot: While clearing out the bedroom closet, Rob finds his old army boots, bringing back memories of how he and Laura first met.

items.title: S01E06 - Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, Mo.
items.summary: Rob runs into Harrison B. Harding but Rob doesn't recall who he is. Harrison knows everything about Rob which bothers Rob greatly. So the Harrisons come to dinner, Rob thinks Harrison may be a con man. Ritchie tells Harrison where Rob's wrist watch is.

infolabels.title: Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, Mo.
infolabels.plot: Rob runs into Harrison B. Harding but Rob doesn't recall who he is. Harrison knows everything about Rob which bothers Rob greatly. So the Harrisons come to dinner, Rob thinks Harrison may be a con man. Ritchie tells Harrison where Rob's wrist watch is.

items.title: S01E07 - Jealousy!
items.summary: Jerry plants seeds of mistrust in Laura's mind when he learns that Valerie Blake, the beautiful movie star, will be guesting on The Alan Brady Show. Laura doesn't listen to him until Rob begins a string of late night work sessions. Soon Laura's jealousy begins to grow and Rob will have to work just as hard to convince Laura that nothing is going on between he and Valerie Blake.

infolabels.title: Jealousy!
infolabels.plot: Jerry plants seeds of mistrust in Laura's mind when he learns that Valerie Blake, the beautiful movie star, will be guesting on The Alan Brady Show. Laura doesn't listen to him until Rob begins a string of late night work sessions. Soon Laura's jealousy begins to grow and Rob will have to work just as hard to convince Laura that nothing is going on between he and Valerie Blake.

items.title: S01E08 - To Tell or Not to Tell
items.summary: Rob wonders if Laura will go back into show business after someone is ill.

infolabels.title: To Tell or Not to Tell
infolabels.plot: Rob wonders if Laura will go back into show business after someone is ill.

items.title: S01E09 - The Unwelcome Houseguest
items.summary: Buddy and his wife can't take their German Shepherd, Larry, with them on a three-day weekend. Buddy wants Rob to keep Larry for the weekend, but Rob refuses because he hasn't talked it over with Laura. The next time we see Rob, he's trying to sneak Larry into the house. Ritchie is afraid because he thinks that Larry is a wolf and Laura can't sleep because Larry is crying. What is Rob to do?

infolabels.title: The Unwelcome Houseguest
infolabels.plot: Buddy and his wife can't take their German Shepherd, Larry, with them on a three-day weekend. Buddy wants Rob to keep Larry for the weekend, but Rob refuses because he hasn't talked it over with Laura. The next time we see Rob, he's trying to sneak Larry into the house. Ritchie is afraid because he thinks that Larry is a wolf and Laura can't sleep because Larry is crying. What is Rob to do?

items.title: S01E10 - The Meershatz Pipe
items.summary: Rob's not as impressed with Buddy's new Meershatz pipe as he is with the fact that it was a gift from Alan Brady. Not just impressed but envious as well. After all, he is the head writer of the show and begins to feel as if he isn't needed. Getting sick and having to miss work for several days doesn't help his insecurities.

infolabels.title: The Meershatz Pipe
infolabels.plot: Rob's not as impressed with Buddy's new Meershatz pipe as he is with the fact that it was a gift from Alan Brady. Not just impressed but envious as well. After all, he is the head writer of the show and begins to feel as if he isn't needed. Getting sick and having to miss work for several days doesn't help his insecurities.

items.title: S01E11 - Forty-Four Tickets
items.summary: Rob trips over a toy that Ritchie to pick up he even forget the Bridge night! Rob has also asked the PTA to come to a taping of The Alan Brady Show Mrs. Billings (Eleanor Audley) president of the PTA comes by to get the 44 tickets, Rob forgot to get the tickets! Now Rob has a few tickets.

infolabels.title: Forty-Four Tickets
infolabels.plot: Rob trips over a toy that Ritchie to pick up he even forget the Bridge night! Rob has also asked the PTA to come to a taping of The Alan Brady Show Mrs. Billings (Eleanor Audley) president of the PTA comes by to get the 44 tickets, Rob forgot to get the tickets! Now Rob has a few tickets.

items.title: S01E12 - Empress Carlotta's Necklace
items.summary: Rob buys Laura a hideous necklace but Laura can't bring herself to tell Rob how she really feels about it. When Rob invites his parents to see the necklace, his mother has a surprising reaction.

infolabels.title: Empress Carlotta's Necklace
infolabels.plot: Rob buys Laura a hideous necklace but Laura can't bring herself to tell Rob how she really feels about it. When Rob invites his parents to see the necklace, his mother has a surprising reaction.

items.title: S01E13 - Sally Is a Girl
items.summary: Rob takes Laura's advice when Laura shows Rob how to treat Sally like a lady after seeing her treated like a guy. Laura doesn't realize what trouble she causes!

infolabels.title: Sally Is a Girl
infolabels.plot: Rob takes Laura's advice when Laura shows Rob how to treat Sally like a lady after seeing her treated like a guy. Laura doesn't realize what trouble she causes!

items.title: S01E14 - Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?
items.summary: Buddy wants to leave the show to become Head Writer of another show. Mel can't release Buddy from his contract, so he helps Rob and Sally write a memo to Alan to encourage him to fire Buddy.

infolabels.title: Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?
infolabels.plot: Buddy wants to leave the show to become Head Writer of another show. Mel can't release Buddy from his contract, so he helps Rob and Sally write a memo to Alan to encourage him to fire Buddy.

items.title: S01E15 - Where Did I Come From?
items.summary: Rob recalls the hilarious events leading up to Ritchie's birth when Ritchie asks the inevitable question.

infolabels.title: Where Did I Come From?
infolabels.plot: Rob recalls the hilarious events leading up to Ritchie's birth when Ritchie asks the inevitable question.

items.title: S01E16 - The Curious Thing About Women
items.summary: Rob uses Laura's habit of opening his mail as the basis for a sketch on The Alan Brady Show.

infolabels.title: The Curious Thing About Women
infolabels.plot: Rob uses Laura's habit of opening his mail as the basis for a sketch on The Alan Brady Show.

items.title: S01E17 - Punch Thy Neighbor
items.summary: Laura Millie and Jerry are watching the latest episode of The Alan Brady Show, Jerry tells everybody including the police officer who comes by to ask for tickets that show was bad. Rob takes Millie's advice (after Rob asks if everybody wants more coffee & Millie tries to Jerry to stop joking) pours hot coffee on Jerry's pants!

infolabels.title: Punch Thy Neighbor
infolabels.plot: Laura Millie and Jerry are watching the latest episode of The Alan Brady Show, Jerry tells everybody including the police officer who comes by to ask for tickets that show was bad. Rob takes Millie's advice (after Rob asks if everybody wants more coffee & Millie tries to Jerry to stop joking) pours hot coffee on Jerry's pants!

items.title: S01E18 - Who Owes Who What?
items.summary: Laura wants to get ahead on paying taxes and tries to ask Rob about a $25 check while he is watching a boxing match and is mad because he missed the punch. Rob tries to figure out how to ask Buddy to pay him $25. Rob lies to Laura by saying Buddy paid the money back.

infolabels.title: Who Owes Who What?
infolabels.plot: Laura wants to get ahead on paying taxes and tries to ask Rob about a $25 check while he is watching a boxing match and is mad because he missed the punch. Rob tries to figure out how to ask Buddy to pay him $25. Rob lies to Laura by saying Buddy paid the money back.

items.title: S01E19 - The Talented Neighborhood
items.summary: The Alan Brady Show is looking for talented kids and Rob is asked to get auditions for practically every kid in the neighborhood.

infolabels.title: The Talented Neighborhood
infolabels.plot: The Alan Brady Show is looking for talented kids and Rob is asked to get auditions for practically every kid in the neighborhood.

items.title: S01E20 - A Word a Day
items.summary: Ritchie is starting to learn some new words. He says a bad word to Laura in the car. She thinks ignoring it is the best course, but Rob wants to have a "man-to-man" talk with Ritchie. Rob also wants to confront the family that he assumes is responsible for Ritchie learning the bad words, but that could prove embarrassing.

infolabels.title: A Word a Day
infolabels.plot: Ritchie is starting to learn some new words. He says a bad word to Laura in the car. She thinks ignoring it is the best course, but Rob wants to have a "man-to-man" talk with Ritchie. Rob also wants to confront the family that he assumes is responsible for Ritchie learning the bad words, but that could prove embarrassing.

items.title: S01E21 - The Boarder Incident
items.summary: Buddy's wife is out of town, so Rob invites Buddy to stay at his house for the duration. Disaster ensues.

infolabels.title: The Boarder Incident
infolabels.plot: Buddy's wife is out of town, so Rob invites Buddy to stay at his house for the duration. Disaster ensues.

items.title: S01E22 - Father of the Week
items.summary: Rob is invited to talk to Richie's class about what he does for a living. However, Richie hates the idea, thinking the other kids will be bored listening to his dad talk about comedy writing.

infolabels.title: Father of the Week
infolabels.plot: Rob is invited to talk to Richie's class about what he does for a living. However, Richie hates the idea, thinking the other kids will be bored listening to his dad talk about comedy writing.

items.title: S01E23 - The Twizzle
items.summary: Sally drags the entire gang to a bowling alley when she discovers a new dance sensation that's sure to sweep the nation.

infolabels.title: The Twizzle
infolabels.plot: Sally drags the entire gang to a bowling alley when she discovers a new dance sensation that's sure to sweep the nation.

items.title: S01E24 - One Angry Man
items.summary: Rob gets called for jury duty. Unbeknownst to Rob, Laura attends the trial. The defendant is an exotic dancer. Is she really innocent as only Rob believes? Is Rob going to be in a lot of trouble when he gets home?

infolabels.title: One Angry Man
infolabels.plot: Rob gets called for jury duty. Unbeknownst to Rob, Laura attends the trial. The defendant is an exotic dancer. Is she really innocent as only Rob believes? Is Rob going to be in a lot of trouble when he gets home?

items.title: S01E25 - Where You Been, Fassbinder?
items.summary: Sally doesn't have a date for her birthday, then an old friend from high school (Leo Fassbinder) calls. Sally invites Leo to her apartment for a quiet evening, but Rob, Laura, Buddy and Mel think Leo is just a made up friend and plan to bring a loud party to Sally's apartment.

infolabels.title: Where You Been, Fassbinder?
infolabels.plot: Sally doesn't have a date for her birthday, then an old friend from high school (Leo Fassbinder) calls. Sally invites Leo to her apartment for a quiet evening, but Rob, Laura, Buddy and Mel think Leo is just a made up friend and plan to bring a loud party to Sally's apartment.

items.title: S01E26 - I Am My Brother's Keeper
items.summary: Rob tells Jerry that Stacey sleep walks, there is one problem Stacey needs to be awake to audition for Alan Brady. Rob plans a party for Stacey to see if he will make it on the show. Will Alan be there? Mel is asked to go to Rob's house but Alan will need to give up his poker game.

infolabels.title: I Am My Brother's Keeper
infolabels.plot: Rob tells Jerry that Stacey sleep walks, there is one problem Stacey needs to be awake to audition for Alan Brady. Rob plans a party for Stacey to see if he will make it on the show. Will Alan be there? Mel is asked to go to Rob's house but Alan will need to give up his poker game.

items.title: S01E27 - The Sleeping Brother
items.summary: Rob's shy brother Stacey has a problem. He's a somnambulist! And Stacey's a great performer when he's asleep. How can Rob get Stacey to perform a great audition for Alan Brady while Stacey is awake?

infolabels.title: The Sleeping Brother
infolabels.plot: Rob's shy brother Stacey has a problem. He's a somnambulist! And Stacey's a great performer when he's asleep. How can Rob get Stacey to perform a great audition for Alan Brady while Stacey is awake?

items.title: S01E28 - The Bad Old Days
items.summary: Rob starts to feel like he does too much housework when Buddy warns him about the decline of the American male.

infolabels.title: The Bad Old Days
infolabels.plot: Rob starts to feel like he does too much housework when Buddy warns him about the decline of the American male.

items.title: S01E29 - Sol and the Sponsor
items.summary: Rob faces a dilemma when a rambunctious old army pal must be told he cannot attend a special dinner party that the Petries are throwing to make an impression with an Alan Brady Show sponsor.

infolabels.title: Sol and the Sponsor
infolabels.plot: Rob faces a dilemma when a rambunctious old army pal must be told he cannot attend a special dinner party that the Petries are throwing to make an impression with an Alan Brady Show sponsor.

items.title: S01E30 - The Return of Happy Spangler
items.summary: Laura meets Happy Spangler who guesses who she is married to. Rob got his first job from Happy. Rob offers Happy a job to help Buddy and Sally write the show but doesn't feel he can do it. The gang quickly gets tired of Happy. Rob has to let him go because Happy can't come up with a joke.

infolabels.title: The Return of Happy Spangler
infolabels.plot: Laura meets Happy Spangler who guesses who she is married to. Rob got his first job from Happy. Rob offers Happy a job to help Buddy and Sally write the show but doesn't feel he can do it. The gang quickly gets tired of Happy. Rob has to let him go because Happy can't come up with a joke.

items.title: S02E01 - Never Name a Duck
items.summary: Rob brings home two baby ducks left over from the show, and Ritchie becomes attached to them. When one dies and the other becomes ill, Rob must convince him that wild animals are happier when left in the wild.

infolabels.title: Never Name a Duck
infolabels.plot: Rob brings home two baby ducks left over from the show, and Ritchie becomes attached to them. When one dies and the other becomes ill, Rob must convince him that wild animals are happier when left in the wild.

items.title: S02E02 - The Two Faces of Rob
items.summary: Rob tries to prove he can use a fake accent to fool Laura into flirting with a stranger, then is dismayed to think that he really has.

infolabels.title: The Two Faces of Rob
infolabels.plot: Rob tries to prove he can use a fake accent to fool Laura into flirting with a stranger, then is dismayed to think that he really has.

items.title: S02E03 - The Attempted Marriage
items.summary: Rob and Laura tell Ritchie the story of their failed attempts to get married.

infolabels.title: The Attempted Marriage
infolabels.plot: Rob and Laura tell Ritchie the story of their failed attempts to get married.

items.title: S02E04 - Bank Book 6565696
items.summary: When Rob discovers Laura’s secret bank, he thinks he is getting a new projector for his birthday—but instead he receives a sports shirt, and begins to wonder what that money is really for.

infolabels.title: Bank Book 6565696
infolabels.plot: When Rob discovers Laura’s secret bank, he thinks he is getting a new projector for his birthday—but instead he receives a sports shirt, and begins to wonder what that money is really for.

items.title: S02E05 - Hustling the Hustler
items.summary: Rob invites Buddy’s brother Blackie for a friendly game of pool, not realizing that he is a hustler.

infolabels.title: Hustling the Hustler
infolabels.plot: Rob invites Buddy’s brother Blackie for a friendly game of pool, not realizing that he is a hustler.

items.title: S02E06 - My Husband Is Not a Drunk
items.summary: Rob accidentally intercepts a hypnotic suggestion meant for Buddy, and doesn’t realize that every time he hears a bell ring, he starts acting like a roaring drunk.

infolabels.title: My Husband Is Not a Drunk
infolabels.plot: Rob accidentally intercepts a hypnotic suggestion meant for Buddy, and doesn’t realize that every time he hears a bell ring, he starts acting like a roaring drunk.

items.title: S02E07 - What's in a Middle Name?
items.summary: Ritchie wonders what the ""R"" in his middle name stands for (Rose Bud) Rob and Laura figure out how to explain how he got Rose Bud for a middle name, it started when Laura tells Rob she is going to have a baby. Ritchie learns he has 7 middle names! (which spell out Rose Bud)

infolabels.title: What's in a Middle Name?
infolabels.plot: Ritchie wonders what the ""R"" in his middle name stands for (Rose Bud) Rob and Laura figure out how to explain how he got Rose Bud for a middle name, it started when Laura tells Rob she is going to have a baby. Ritchie learns he has 7 middle names! (which spell out Rose Bud)

items.title: S02E08 - Like a Sister
items.summary: Rob thinks Rick Vallone isn't right for Sally and tries to make him drunk (Sally hates drunks) and asks Rick to fall in love with Laura. Laura is always to smart for Rob and he realizes love is too hard to break.

infolabels.title: Like a Sister
infolabels.plot: Rob thinks Rick Vallone isn't right for Sally and tries to make him drunk (Sally hates drunks) and asks Rick to fall in love with Laura. Laura is always to smart for Rob and he realizes love is too hard to break.

items.title: S02E09 - The Night the Roof Fell In
items.summary: Rob comes home mad because the script needed a rewrite, Buddy was late & Sally left early. Rob leaves mad and goes for a walk. Laura wants a chance to talk to somebody so Millie listens not quite sure what they fought about.

infolabels.title: The Night the Roof Fell In
infolabels.plot: Rob comes home mad because the script needed a rewrite, Buddy was late & Sally left early. Rob leaves mad and goes for a walk. Laura wants a chance to talk to somebody so Millie listens not quite sure what they fought about.

items.title: S02E10 - The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally
items.summary: Rob worries that Buddy & Sally aren't his friends & falling in love with each other. Rob calls Buddy at home and Pickles and thinks Buddy picked up the phone. Now Rob has proof (or so he thinks) that Buddy are working on another show. They are doing a nightclub act on the side.

infolabels.title: The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally
infolabels.plot: Rob worries that Buddy & Sally aren't his friends & falling in love with each other. Rob calls Buddy at home and Pickles and thinks Buddy picked up the phone. Now Rob has proof (or so he thinks) that Buddy are working on another show. They are doing a nightclub act on the side.

items.title: S02E11 - A Bird in the Head Hurts
items.summary: Ritchie claims he is being attacked by a giant woodpecker, but Rob and Laura are convinced it’s just a bid for attention.

infolabels.title: A Bird in the Head Hurts
infolabels.plot: Ritchie claims he is being attacked by a giant woodpecker, but Rob and Laura are convinced it’s just a bid for attention.

items.title: S02E12 - Gesundheit, Darling
items.summary: Rob, Laura, Jerry & Millie are playing cards, when Jerry thinks Rob might be sneezing because he keeps losing a game. Rob thinks he could be allergic to Laura. Rob goes to the doctor to find out he could be allergic to his wife!

infolabels.title: Gesundheit, Darling
infolabels.plot: Rob, Laura, Jerry & Millie are playing cards, when Jerry thinks Rob might be sneezing because he keeps losing a game. Rob thinks he could be allergic to Laura. Rob goes to the doctor to find out he could be allergic to his wife!

items.title: S02E13 - A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
items.summary: Rob bites some chicken and breaks a tooth but feels bad when another dentist fixes the tooth. He worries that Jerry won't be his friend. Rob tries not to show his teeth. Jerry isn't mad at Rob.

infolabels.title: A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
infolabels.plot: Rob bites some chicken and breaks a tooth but feels bad when another dentist fixes the tooth. He worries that Jerry won't be his friend. Rob tries not to show his teeth. Jerry isn't mad at Rob.

items.title: S02E14 - Somebody Has to Play Cleopatra
items.summary: Rob recalls directing last year’s PTA variety show, when jealousy interfered as he tried to pair the perfect Cleopatra with an amorous Mark Antony.

infolabels.title: Somebody Has to Play Cleopatra
infolabels.plot: Rob recalls directing last year’s PTA variety show, when jealousy interfered as he tried to pair the perfect Cleopatra with an amorous Mark Antony.

items.title: S02E15 - The Cat Burglar
items.summary: Rob & Laura read about a cat burglar and wants his picture in the paper. A noise is heard & Rob takes the gun but can't find the bullets! Laura puts them in her Jewelry box!

infolabels.title: The Cat Burglar
infolabels.plot: Rob & Laura read about a cat burglar and wants his picture in the paper. A noise is heard & Rob takes the gun but can't find the bullets! Laura puts them in her Jewelry box!

items.title: S02E16 - The Foul Weather Girl
items.summary: Laura has a problem when a girl asks for help in lading a role on the show. Laura's problems get worse as Janie tells Laura how far they go back in high school and she is single. Laura gets mad when Rob works nights with Janie, She begins to thank Mel and not Rob.

infolabels.title: The Foul Weather Girl
infolabels.plot: Laura has a problem when a girl asks for help in lading a role on the show. Laura's problems get worse as Janie tells Laura how far they go back in high school and she is single. Laura gets mad when Rob works nights with Janie, She begins to thank Mel and not Rob.

items.title: S02E17 - Will You Two Be My Wife?
items.summary: Buddy and Sally find Rob’s manuscript, which tells the story of the time he had to choose how to spend a three-day leave from the Army: go on a honeymoon with Laura, or travel back to Danville to tell his former fiancée Dorothy that he was marrying someone else.

infolabels.title: Will You Two Be My Wife?
infolabels.plot: Buddy and Sally find Rob’s manuscript, which tells the story of the time he had to choose how to spend a three-day leave from the Army: go on a honeymoon with Laura, or travel back to Danville to tell his former fiancée Dorothy that he was marrying someone else.

items.title: S02E18 - Ray Murdock's X-Ray
items.summary: Rob goes on an interview show, where he is tricked into describing Laura as a nut.

infolabels.title: Ray Murdock's X-Ray
infolabels.plot: Rob goes on an interview show, where he is tricked into describing Laura as a nut.

items.title: S02E19 - I Was a Teenage Head Writer
items.summary: Rob recalls the day he became head writer of the Alan Brady Show, and his first day of work with Buddy and Sally.

infolabels.title: I Was a Teenage Head Writer
infolabels.plot: Rob recalls the day he became head writer of the Alan Brady Show, and his first day of work with Buddy and Sally.

items.title: S02E20 - It May Look Like a Walnut!
items.summary: In this classic, Rob has a dream - inspired by a late-night horror movie on TV - involving walnuts, missing thumbs, and a creature named Kolac.

infolabels.title: It May Look Like a Walnut!
infolabels.plot: In this classic, Rob has a dream - inspired by a late-night horror movie on TV - involving walnuts, missing thumbs, and a creature named Kolac.

items.title: S02E21 - My Husband Is a Check-Grabber
items.summary: Rob wonders why Laura is angry with him, and learns she objects to his habit of picking up checks when they go out with their friends.

infolabels.title: My Husband Is a Check-Grabber
infolabels.plot: Rob wonders why Laura is angry with him, and learns she objects to his habit of picking up checks when they go out with their friends.

items.title: S02E22 - Don't Trip Over That Mountain
items.summary: Laura is convinced that Rob will hurt himself on a ski trip, and when he actually does, Rob tries to hide his injuries rather than admit she was right.

infolabels.title: Don't Trip Over That Mountain
infolabels.plot: Laura is convinced that Rob will hurt himself on a ski trip, and when he actually does, Rob tries to hide his injuries rather than admit she was right.

items.title: S02E23 - Give Me Your Walls!
items.summary: Rob and Laura hire a painter who seems to want to do anything but paint their walls.

infolabels.title: Give Me Your Walls!
infolabels.plot: Rob and Laura hire a painter who seems to want to do anything but paint their walls.

items.title: S02E24 - The Sam Pomerantz Scandals
items.summary: Buddy and Sally are asked by Rob to help in a show for a friend of Rob's - Danny Brewster.

infolabels.title: The Sam Pomerantz Scandals
infolabels.plot: Buddy and Sally are asked by Rob to help in a show for a friend of Rob's - Danny Brewster.

items.title: S02E25 - The Square Triangle
items.summary: This week’s guest star on the Alan Brady Show turns out to be someone from Rob and Laura’s past—and they both have a reason to avoid him.

infolabels.title: The Square Triangle
infolabels.plot: This week’s guest star on the Alan Brady Show turns out to be someone from Rob and Laura’s past—and they both have a reason to avoid him.

items.title: S02E26 - I'm No Henry Walden!
items.summary: Rob gets to meet Henry Walden at literary party but feels uncomfortable when he learns that he is the only comedy writer. The Hotels can't get their names right!

infolabels.title: I'm No Henry Walden!
infolabels.plot: Rob gets to meet Henry Walden at literary party but feels uncomfortable when he learns that he is the only comedy writer. The Hotels can't get their names right!

items.title: S02E27 - Racy Tracy Rattigan
items.summary: Alan Brady is out of town so Tracy Rattigan is the host. Rob is going to have to fight to keep Laura. Rob doesn't like how fast things are going. Tracy loves driving Rob crazy, The gang writes the best show for Tracy.

infolabels.title: Racy Tracy Rattigan
infolabels.plot: Alan Brady is out of town so Tracy Rattigan is the host. Rob is going to have to fight to keep Laura. Rob doesn't like how fast things are going. Tracy loves driving Rob crazy, The gang writes the best show for Tracy.

items.title: S02E28 - Divorce
items.summary: Rob gets in the middle of a marital dispute between Buddy and Pickles.

infolabels.title: Divorce
infolabels.plot: Rob gets in the middle of a marital dispute between Buddy and Pickles.

items.title: S02E29 - It's a Shame She Married Me
items.summary: Rob meets Jim Darling who is an old flame Laura dated. Rob won't tell Laura he ran into Jim at the office, Rob tells Jim they can't make it to his party because Ritchie is sick. Jim then brings the party to the Petrie home. Rob wants Laura to wear a jacket so Jim won't fall in love with her again.

infolabels.title: It's a Shame She Married Me
infolabels.plot: Rob meets Jim Darling who is an old flame Laura dated. Rob won't tell Laura he ran into Jim at the office, Rob tells Jim they can't make it to his party because Ritchie is sick. Jim then brings the party to the Petrie home. Rob wants Laura to wear a jacket so Jim won't fall in love with her again.

items.title: S02E30 - A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise

items.title: S03E03 - Laura's Little Lie
items.summary: Are Rob and Laura married? This episode brings up that question as Rob asks Laura to sign insurance forms that Laura never signed. Laura does everything she can to hide a mistake Rob doesn't know about. Rob is tired of ""losing his wife"" He finds out he married a 17 year-old Laura.

Laura does everything she can to hide a mistake Rob doesn't know about. Rob is tired of ""losing his wife"" He finds out he married a 17 year-old Laura.

items.title: S05E03 - Uhny Uftz
items.summary: Rob and Buddy are working late, and keep thinking they hear a metallic voice saying ""Uhny Uftz""! The explore a supposedly abandoned office somewhere in the building, and find a somewhat 'mad' inventor (complete with a taciturn and vaguely menacing assistant) who has constructed a toy flying saucer. It works quite well, except that, instead of saying ""Merry Christmas"" as the inventor intended, the saucer only says ""Uhny Uftz"".

The explore a supposedly abandoned office somewhere in the building, and find a somewhat 'mad' inventor (complete with a taciturn and vaguely menacing assistant) who has constructed a toy flying saucer. It works quite well, except that, instead of saying ""Merry Christmas"" as the inventor intended, the saucer only says ""Uhny Uftz"".

items.title: S05E13 - You're Under Arrest
items.summary: After fighting with Laura, Rob is arrested for hurting an old Lady. Rob has trouble telling police he didn't hurt the Lady (whom he saw in a barroom).

infolabels.title: You're Under Arrest
infolabels.plot: After fighting with Laura, Rob is arrested for hurting an old Lady. Rob has trouble telling police he didn't hurt the Lady (whom he saw in a barroom).

items.title: S05E14 - Fifty-Two, Forty-Five or Work
items.summary: The Alan Brady Show is on hiatus Rob is worried about to support Laura (who is pregnant with Ritchie) Rob doesn't anyone to know he needs a job until The Alan Brady Show returns from hiatus.

infolabels.title: Fifty-Two, Forty-Five or Work
infolabels.plot: The Alan Brady Show is on hiatus Rob is worried about to support Laura (who is pregnant with Ritchie) Rob doesn't anyone to know he needs a job until The Alan Brady Show returns from hiatus.

items.title: S05E15 - Who Stole My Watch?
items.summary: After Rob loses his watch that he got as birthday gift, He thinks everyone he knows took his watch. Laura and Rob plan a party to say they are sorry after they learn a crook stole Rob's watch.

infolabels.title: Who Stole My Watch?
infolabels.plot: After Rob loses his watch that he got as birthday gift, He thinks everyone he knows took his watch. Laura and Rob plan a party to say they are sorry after they learn a crook stole Rob's watch.

items.title: S05E16 - I Do Not Choose to Run
items.summary: Rob gives a speech at council meeting that will land him a nomination for city councilman of New Rochelle.

infolabels.title: I Do Not Choose to Run
infolabels.plot: Rob gives a speech at council meeting that will land him a nomination for city councilman of New Rochelle.

items.title: S05E17 - The Making of a Councilman
items.summary: Rob decides to quit running for his seat on the New Rochelle city council after meeting the opponent running against him because of his experience.

infolabels.title: The Making of a Councilman
infolabels.plot: Rob decides to quit running for his seat on the New Rochelle city council after meeting the opponent running against him because of his experience.

items.title: S05E18 - The Curse of the Petrie People
items.summary: Laura gets a brooch that (in the shape of the United States) tells the history of the Petrie family. Laura later puts the brooch in the garbage! We learn that Rob's mom hates the brooch!

infolabels.title: The Curse of the Petrie People
infolabels.plot: Laura gets a brooch that (in the shape of the United States) tells the history of the Petrie family. Laura later puts the brooch in the garbage! We learn that Rob's mom hates the brooch!

items.title: S05E19 - The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart
items.summary: Mel is in trouble for not telling Alan that there was a change in the script. Rob tries to get Mel to stick up for himself, But Mel gets fired.

infolabels.title: The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart
infolabels.plot: Mel is in trouble for not telling Alan that there was a change in the script. Rob tries to get Mel to stick up for himself, But Mel gets fired.

items.title: S05E20 - Remember the Alimony
items.summary: Rob and Laura leave Anchor Texas to go to Mexico only to find that marriage is hard to do. They soon find out that getting a divorce is easier than they thought (it costs $10 in Mexico!)

infolabels.title: Remember the Alimony
infolabels.plot: Rob and Laura leave Anchor Texas to go to Mexico only to find that marriage is hard to do. They soon find out that getting a divorce is easier than they thought (it costs $10 in Mexico!)

items.title: S05E21 - Dear Sally Rogers
items.summary: Sally really wants a husband she goes on ""The Stevie Parsons Show"" thinking she has finally found a husband or has she? Stevie asks Rob to help in a stunt where Stevie picks a letter written to Sally, One problem Sally has no idea what will happen! Wait until Sally finds out who Box 7030 is!

infolabels.title: Dear Sally Rogers
infolabels.plot: Sally really wants a husband she goes on ""The Stevie Parsons Show"" thinking she has finally found a husband or has she? Stevie asks Rob to help in a stunt where Stevie picks a letter written to Sally, One problem Sally has no idea what will happen! Wait until Sally finds out who Box 7030 is!

items.title: S05E22 - Buddy Sorrell, Man and Boy
items.summary: Rob & Sally think Buddy is having an affair but he is getting ready for his bar mitzvah.

infolabels.title: Buddy Sorrell, Man and Boy
infolabels.plot: Rob & Sally think Buddy is having an affair but he is getting ready for his bar mitzvah.

items.title: S05E23 - Bad Reception in Albany
items.summary: Rob and Laura are attending a wedding in Albany, Rob is asked by Alan to watch a fashion show. He promises to tell Alan what he thought of it. Rob has to hurry to the church to usher a wedding.

infolabels.title: Bad Reception in Albany
infolabels.plot: Rob and Laura are attending a wedding in Albany, Rob is asked by Alan to watch a fashion show. He promises to tell Alan what he thought of it. Rob has to hurry to the church to usher a wedding.

items.title: S05E24 - Talk to the Snail
items.summary: Rob fears his job is gone after reading a memo (found in the trash where they are looking for this week's script that Buddy lost) Rob almost writes for Jelly Bean a snail!

infolabels.title: Talk to the Snail
infolabels.plot: Rob fears his job is gone after reading a memo (found in the trash where they are looking for this week's script that Buddy lost) Rob almost writes for Jelly Bean a snail!

items.title: S05E25 - A Day in the Life of Alan Brady
items.summary: Jerry & Millie are having their anniversary party, at the Petrie home one problem the party is a part of documentary that focuses on Alan.

infolabels.title: A Day in the Life of Alan Brady
infolabels.plot: Jerry & Millie are having their anniversary party, at the Petrie home one problem the party is a part of documentary that focuses on Alan.

items.title: S05E26 - Obnoxious, Offensive, Egomaniac, Etc.
items.summary: The staff sends a script to Alan Brady without deleting the insults directed at the star that they routinely add to blow off steam.

infolabels.title: Obnoxious, Offensive, Egomaniac, Etc.
infolabels.plot: The staff sends a script to Alan Brady without deleting the insults directed at the star that they routinely add to blow off steam.

items.title: S05E27 - The Man from My Uncle
items.summary: Ritchie's bedroom is used as a stakeout point (it has the best view) Harry Bond is looking for the nephew of Wendell Gerard, Rob loves the gadgets the agent brings to solve the case.

infolabels.title: The Man from My Uncle
infolabels.plot: Ritchie's bedroom is used as a stakeout point (it has the best view) Harry Bond is looking for the nephew of Wendell Gerard, Rob loves the gadgets the agent brings to solve the case.

items.title: S05E28 - You Ought to Be in Pictures
items.summary: Rob gets a movie role, but he has to kiss a woman. Laura makes sure that nothing else happens.

infolabels.title: You Ought to Be in Pictures
infolabels.plot: Rob gets a movie role, but he has to kiss a woman. Laura makes sure that nothing else happens.

items.title: S05E29 - Love Thy Other Neighbor
items.summary: Laura and Rob spend time with the Staggs and going to the theater,Jerry & Millie feel left out.

infolabels.title: Love Thy Other Neighbor
infolabels.plot: Laura and Rob spend time with the Staggs and going to the theater,Jerry & Millie feel left out.

items.title: S05E30 - Long Night's Journey into Day
items.summary: Rob & Jerry go fishing leaving Laura (who has a cold) home alone with a mynah bird. Millie comes back to keep Laura company, Millie couldn't find Laura (She was taking a shower).

infolabels.title: Long Night's Journey into Day
infolabels.plot: Rob & Jerry go fishing leaving Laura (who has a cold) home alone with a mynah bird. Millie comes back to keep Laura company, Millie couldn't find Laura (She was taking a shower).

items.title: S05E31 - The Gunslinger
items.summary: Under anesthesia for a dental procedure, Rob dreams he is a sheriff in the old west.

infolabels.title: The Gunslinger
infolabels.plot: Under anesthesia for a dental procedure, Rob dreams he is a sheriff in the old west.

items.title: S05E32 - The Last Chapter
items.summary: Rob gives Laura his book (it took 5 years to write.) As Laura begins to read the book, we see classic moments from several episodes. The book takes us through how Rob and Laura met as well as how Rob almost missed his wedding! Later Rob talks about waiting for the birth Ritchie. As Laura finishes the book Rob tells her the publisher hated the book, Alan Brady decides to make the book into a TV series!

infolabels.title: The Last Chapter

As Laura finishes the book Rob tells her the publisher hated the book, Alan Brady decides to make the book into a TV series!
